book_info":{"abstract":"穿越到灵气复苏、妖兽横行的高武世界。
叶玄迷茫之际得到了能够沟通万界的次元聊天群。
看着群中熟悉的大佬，叶玄陷入了沉思。
托尼史塔克：“我会死？”
白胡子：“我儿子死了？被我另一个儿子坑死的？”
漩涡长门：“我被人说死了？”
众人的目光聚在叶玄身上。
叶玄：“看什么？我没死。”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/2ed45ee8f0364bb04813f4b6c2192d44","author":"番茄炖牛腩","author_id":"","book_id":"7018467170132691999","book_name":"高武聊天群","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#404050","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"4435人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{"category_id":262,"name":"都市脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=262&name=都市脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":71,"name":"诸天万界","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=71&name=诸天万界&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":39,"name":"二次元","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=39&name=二次元&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":368,"name":"火影","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=368&name=火影&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":370,"name":"海贼","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=370&name=海贼&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":374,"name":"漫威","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=374&name=漫威&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":381,"name":"聊天群","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=381&name=聊天群&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7018524007167164959","read_count":"4435","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"790203"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.5","serial_count":"375","tags":"都市脑洞,都市,系统,穿越,二次元,诸天万界,火影,海贼,漫威,聊天群","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-images/372e8cad771eb26e6aec7f18a5543eae~tplv-noop.ima 没有那种莫名其妙的自我怀疑，也没有那种突如其来的自言自语。就感觉作者写的挺好的。
然后本书也不是一味的讲故事那种，跟倾向于是讲每个角色所在的世界的那一个时间节点的剧情，总体还可以吧。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1746420748,"group_id":"7018467170132691999","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"（我是专业未满30分钟评论家）
